description_for_human: Transaction coordination for real estate. Ask about active deals, key dates, contingencies, missing documents, and next required actions.
description_for_model: DocJacket is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for real estate Transaction Coordinators. Prefer MCP transport at https://mcp.docjacket.com/mcp (JSON-RPC 2.0, OAuth 2.1). Use this plugin manifest only if the host environment cannot speak MCP. Tools cover: searching transactions by address or party, reading key dates and contingencies, identifying missing documents, ranking next required actions, sending agent follow-ups and client updates (after user confirmation), creating tasks and reminders, applying checklist templates, and end-to-end contract intake (upload contract PDF → AI extraction → materialize a new transaction). Live tool catalog with input schemas: call the `mcp_catalog` tool, or fetch https://help.docjacket.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json. Tenant isolation is enforced — every call scopes to the OAuth user's organization.
